reviews.comment:
Si cargas nafta ahí, mira que este en cero el surtidor, por qué se hacen los giles y te lo empiezan desde lo que cargo el anterior. REITERO, VER SURTIDOR QUE ESTE EN CERO.

(Translated by Google)
If you fill up there, make sure the pump is at zero, because they'll play dumb and start filling up from what the previous customer filled up with. I REPEAT, MAKE SURE THE PUMP IS AT ZERO.

reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio ubicada en Villa La Ñata. Ofrece su servicios para autos y lanchas. El acceso es por el predio del ACA. Excelente atención. La ubicación es distinta a lo que suele esperarse para una estación de servicio. Baños habilitados. El edificio es sencillo. Cuenta con un amplio estacionamiento. Las lanchas suelen hacer cola en este punto.

(Translated by Google)
Gas station located in Villa La Ñata. It offers service for cars and boats. Access is through the ACA grounds. Excellent service. The location is different from what one would normally expect for a gas station. Restrooms are available. The building is simple. It has ample parking. Boats often line up at this location.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14089662263619113914/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNJNHNETGhBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención, los playeros súper educados ., siempre atentos a lo que uno necesita. Los baños re limpios. El lugar es re lindo . Pero lo que destaco es la atención que no en todas las estaciones es buena .

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, the staff were incredibly polite and always attentive to our needs. The restrooms were spotless. The place is really nice. But what I want to highlight is the service, which isn't always good at all resorts.
